pickup.name: Encryption Keycard Alpha
pickup.effect: Allows access to the Server Core override.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers the security alarm, unlocking the blast doors to the main terminal.

enemy.name: Maintenance Android Mk.II
enemy.weakness: Encryption Keycard Alpha used to disable its logic core

pickup.name: Overload Capacitor
pickup.effect: Boosts electrical output of the Plasma Wrench.

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the android causes a surge that shorts out the lock mechanism for the boss arena.

pickup.name: Prototype Data Shard
pickup.effect: Must be socketed into the boss's mainframe to expose its core.

encounters.trigger: The Interceptor's death sequence forces the mainframe to reboot, allowing the player to insert the Data Shard.

boss.name: Aegis AI Core
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Prototype Data Shard to corrupt the AI and force a total system shutdown.

output.objective: Infiltrate the server archives and purge the corrupt Aegis AI core before corporate enforcers arrive.
output.reward: Administrative override privileges for the entire sector.

output.setting: Neon-drenched Lower City slums amidst a server-farm riot

pickup.name: EMP Grenade Cluster
pickup.effect: Disables cybernetics in a small radius

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the thug forces a security lockdown, routing power to the Sector 4 blast doors.
Destroying the droid triggers an emergency venting sequence that unlocks the path to the Core Chamber.
Eliminating the assassin initiates a terminal upload, granting access to the Boss lair.

boss.name: Cyber-Titan Executor
boss.victory_condition: Use the System Override Key to disable its shielding before landing the final blow.

output.objective: Infiltrate the Central Mainframe and delete the corrupted AI core.

output.setting: A rain-slicked, neon-drenched maintenance sector of the megacity known as Sector 7G

pickup.name: Overclocked Logic Chip
pickup.effect: Increases hacking speed and detection range

encounters.trigger: Opening the first security gate alerts a patrol drone
Hacking the terminal unlocks the path to the Core

pickup.name: Master Override Key
pickup.effect: Disables the boss's primary shield generator

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel initiates the final Lockdown Protocol

boss.name: The Architect's Phantom AI
boss.victory_condition: Use the Master Override Key to force a system reboot

output.objective: Infiltrate the Core and decrypt the Architect's final files before the sector self-destructs

output.setting: A decaying, neon-drenched megacity district under eternal rainfall

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the drone unlocks the security gate to the Data Hub
Destroying the bot reveals a hidden access tunnel to the Central Core
Defeating the sentinel grants access to the Overlord's chamber

boss.name: Entropy Archon
boss.victory_condition: Use the Master Keycode to drop the Archon's shield, then strike with Chronostaff

output.objective: Restore the city's timeline before the Entropy Archon permanently deletes it
output.reward: The Chronos Core, granting permanent manipulation of local time flow

output.setting: A decaying, neon-lit megastructure research lab overgrown with bio-luminescent synthetic moss.

encounters.trigger: Opening the main lab terminal triggers an alarm that summons the next security drone.

pickup.name: Neural Overclock Injector
pickup.effect: Drastically increases reaction speed and damage output.

encounters.trigger: Downloading the encrypted research data forces a lockdown, waking the final test subject.

pickup.name: Volatile Isotope Key
pickup.effect: Unstable core material that destabilizes boss-level energy shields.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Chimera unlocks the blast doors to the containment silo where the final boss waits.

boss.name: The Architect's Phantom
boss.victory_condition: Inject the Volatile Isotope Key into the boss's mainframe to shatter its shield, then strike with the Acid Vial.

output.objective: Retrieve the rogue AI core from the heart of the research facility.
output.reward: Prototype Alchemist Gauntlet with infinite ammo capacity.

output.setting: The Rust-Choked Sector of Neo-Veridia, a desolate industrial wasteland

encounters.trigger: Opening the main access panel alerts the next sector drone

pickup.name: Cryo-Coolant Canister
pickup.effect: Lowers ambient temperature and brittle-breaks cybernetic joints

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the Enforcer triggers an emergency lockdown alarm, awakening the silent stalker

pickup.name: Master Override Keycard
pickup.effect: Disables the central core's thermal shielding

encounters.trigger: Using the keycard on the central console initiates the final boss sequence

boss.name: Omega-Class Cyber-Lich
boss.victory_condition: Insert the keycard into the exposed cooling port while the boss is recharging its shields

output.objective: Infiltrate the core to disable the city's draining power siphon
output.reward: Infinite Battery Core and access to the upper city

output.setting: The Neon Cloud District, a floating city of holographic graffiti and singing vending machines

encounters.trigger: Approaching the malfunctioning vending machine leads to the second district

encounters.hazard: Stray electrical cables dripping digital oil
encounters.trigger: Stealing the data-drive triggers an alarm leading to the third district
Using the circuit key to unlock the final sanctum begins the boss fight

boss.name: The Great Vending Machine Lord
boss.weakness: Golden Circuit Key inserted into his coin slot
boss.victory_condition: Overload the boss using the Golden Circuit Key, causing him to dispense infinite treats

output.objective: Retrieve the stolen snacks from the Vending Machine Lord

Synthet collapse opens the pressure-sensitive door to the central core
Guardian defeat disables the lockdown protocols guarding the main mainframe

boss.name: Architect Unit Zero
boss.victory_condition: Input key into core while avoiding arena-wide shockwaves

output.objective: Purify the digital consciousness of the city's central mainframe
output.reward: Control over the city's automated infrastructure
